title: ficus dzumacensis var. dzumacensis
intro: Ficus dzumacensis var. dzumacensis, also known as the Philippine banyan, is a variety of fig tree native to the Philippines, characterized by its unique, sprawling growth habit and edible fruit. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ficus dzumacensis var. dzumacensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used to support respiratory health and boost the immune system.
